title: Itegeko ryo Kubungabunga Ibanga
s1_body1: pTrack ('twe', 'twacu') ni porogaramu yo gukurikirana imyanda ya plastiki yagezweho nk'umushinga wa capstone ya ALU, ubu ipiloti mu murenge wa Kimironko i Kigali, Rwanda.
s2_account_body: amazina yuzuye, aderesi ya imeyili, nomero ya telefoni, umurenge, ifoto y'umwirondoro, n'uruhare.
s2_activity_body: raporo z'imyanda (ifoto, ibisobanuro, aho uri kuri GPS igihe utanga raporo, ubwoko bw'imyanda), urutonde rw'ugusubiza (ubwoko, itariki), n'amateka y'amanota y'ibihembo.
s2_technical_body: aderesi ya IP na user-agent, akoranywa gusa kubakora nk'abayobozi kandi akoreshwa gusa mu gukurikirana no kwishingira. Abakoresha bamenyeshwa ibi mbere yo guhabwa uburenganzira bwa admin.
s2_prefs_body: ururimi, ikirangantego, igenamiterere ry'amamenyesha, n'ihitamo ryo kugaragara ku rutonde.
s3_li2: Kwereka ibikorwa byawe n'amanota ku rutonde (ubyemera).
s3_li3: Guhuza imibare y'ingaruka z'umuryango yatanzwe nta mazina.
s3_footer: Ntiturinda amakuru yawe ku bantu ba gatatu cyangwa tuyakoresha mu marangamutima.
s4_body1: Amakuru y'konti n'ibikorwa byawe abitswe kuri DigitalOcean Managed Database (PostgreSQL). Amafoto (y'imyanda n'umwirondoro) abitswe kuri Cloudinary kandi yoherezwa binyuze HTTPS. Ibikarita bya JWT by'uburenganzira birangira nyuma y'amasaha 8; ibikarita by'ugusubiramo birangira nyuma y'iminsi 7 kandi bihindurwa buri gihe bikoreshwa.
s4_body2: Dukoresha ubwunganizi mu nzira (TLS 1.2+), isukurwa ry'ibisohoka, n'igenamiterere ry'ingano kuri za API. Amagambo y'ibanga ashyirwa mu mfuniko ukoresheje Argon2 (hamwe na PBKDF2-SHA256 nk'inzira ya kera). Mu gihe habaye gutakaza amakuru birebana nawe, tuzakumenyesha kuri imeyili mu masaha 72 nyuma yo kumenya ibyabaye.
s5_intro: Ushobora igihe icyo ari cyo cyose:
s5_li1: Gusaba kopi y'amakuru yose dufite kuri wewe.
s5_li3: Gusaba gusibwa kwa konti yawe n'amakuru yose ahuriye nayo.
s5_li4: Gusohoka ku rutonde muri Igenamiterere → Ibanga.
s5_li5: Kuvanaho icyemezo cy'amamenyesha muri Igenamiterere → Amamenyesha.
s5_footer_pre: Kugira ngo ukoreshe uburenganzira bwawe tuandikire kuri
s5_footer_post: . Dusubiza hagati y'amasaha 48 n'iminsi 7 bitewe n'ubunini bw'ikibazo.
s6_cloudinary: ibika amafoto yohererejwe. Amafoto araboneka ku bantu bose binyuze kuri URL yayo; ntukohereze amafoto afite amakuru y'ibanga.
s6_render: ibika porogaramu yacu yo inyuma. Reba DPA ya Render ku nshingano zabo z'iyobora amakuru. Guhuza DPA y'umutanga serivisi ni ibikorwa bisanzwe kandi bigaragaza ubushake bwacu bwo kugaragara.
s6_maps: ihujwe kugira ngo itange inzira (ifungura hanze). Ntiturinda amakuru y'umukoresha na Google Maps.
s7_body: pTrack ntiyerekeye abana bari munsi y'imyaka 16. Ntidukoranya amakuru y'abana by'ubwenge. Niba usuzuma ko umwana wakoze konti, twandikire kandi tuzayisiba vuba.
s8_body: Dushobora kuvugurura iri tegeko kugira ngo rihure n'impinduka mu porogaramu cyangwa amabwiriza y'amategeko. Impinduka z'ingenzi zizamenyeshwa binyuze mu kibari cya porogaramu nibura iminsi 14 mbere. Gukomeza gukoresha nyuma y'iminsi 30 bisobanura kwemera itegeko ryavuguruwe.
s9_title: 9. Amakuru y'Aho Uri no Gukurikirana mu Nyuma
s9_body1: pTrack ikora amakuru y'aho uri gusa iyo utanze raporo y'imyanda. Ntidusubiramo cyangwa ntidukoranya amakuru y'aho uri mu nyuma, kandi ntidukulikirana inzira zawe hagati y'ibikorwa. Iyo ugeze ku kimenyetso cy'"Aho ndi" ku ifishi ya raporo, ikirangantego cy'aho uri kiri ku gikoresho cyawe gizasaba uruhushya — ushobora gutemera hanyuma ukagena umwanya ku makarita nawe.
s9_body2: Tuzi ko porogaramu cyangwa serivisi zindi kuri gikoresho cyawe zishobora gukoranya cyangwa gusangira amakuru y'aho uri bitarebana na pTrack. Niba usuzuma ko ibanga ryawe ryangijwe binyuze muri konti yawe ya pTrack cyangwa amakuru — haba binyuze kuri porogaramu yacu cyangwa serivisi ihuriye nayo — twandikire vuba kuri d.tunyinko@alustudent.com. Tuzasuzuma no gutanga igisubizo cyanditswe mu masaha 48.
s10_title: 10. Kubika mu Buryo bwa Simu no Gukoresha Nta Interineti
s10_body1: Kugira ngo porogaramu ikore nta interineti, pTrack ikoresha ububiko bwa simu (local storage) (kubika ibikunda bya ibikorwa n'ibikarita by'uburenganzira) na IndexedDB (kubika raporo z'imyanda, urutonde rw'ugusubiza, n'impinduka z'umwirondoro yakoranywe uri hanze ya interineti).
s10_body2: Amakuru y'ububiko bwa simu aguma kuri gikoresho cyawe kandi yoherezwa kuri serweri zacu gusa igihe interineti yawe igarutse. Ushobora gusiba aya makuru igihe icyo ari cyo cyose binyuze mu magenamiterere ya simu. Gusiba ububiko bwa simu bizakuvana mu porogaramu.
s11_body: Amakuru y'konti yawe n'amateka y'ibikorwa abikwa igihe konti yawe igihari. Niba usabye gusibwa kwa konti, amakuru yose y'umuntu — harimo raporo z'imyanda, urutonde rw'ugusubiza, amateka y'amanota, n'amakuru y'umwirondoro — asibwa burundu mu minsi 30 y'inyandiko. Imibare ihuze itamenyesha umuntu (nk'umubare w'ikirangirire mu murenge) ishobora gukomeza kubikwa burundu kuko ntishobora kugaragaza. Urutonde rw'ibikorwa by'abayobozi rubikwa amezi 12.
